name: file_converter
description: Convert files between formats. Currently supports CSV ↔ JSON. Optionally remap column/key names via a mapping array. When mapping is omitted, all fields pass through unchanged. For CSV → JSON, supports type coercion: 'string' (default), 'number' (parse as number), 'json' (parse JSON string into object/array).

source_path.description: Absolute path to the source file

mapping.description: Optional column/key mapping. When omitted, all fields pass through unchanged.

type.description: Type coercion (CSV → JSON only, ignored for JSON → CSV): 'string' (default), 'number', 'json'
